inputs.label: Number of Rods
inputs.businessContext: The quantity to convert from rods to feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The quantity to convert from rods to feet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Menge, die von Ruten in Fuß umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La quantité à convertir de perches en pieds.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad a convertir de varas a pies.

inputs.label: Feet per Rod
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor. Standard US survey rod is 16.5 feet. Adjust if using a different definition.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor. Standard US survey rod is 16.5 feet. Adjust if using a different definition.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm faktörü. Standart ABD araştırma rod'u 16,5 feet'tir. Farklı bir tanım kullanılıyorsa ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umrechnungsfaktor. Die übliche US-Vermessungsrute beträgt 16,5 Fuß. Passen Sie an, wenn eine andere Definition verwendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion. La perche d'arpentage US standard est de 16,5 pieds. Ajustez si vous utilisez une définition différente.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión. La vara estándar de agrimensura de EE. UU. es de 16.5 pies. Ajuste si usa una definición diferente.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida.

inputs.label: Safety Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage to add for safety margin in engineering calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage to add for safety margin in engineering calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik hesaplamalarında güvenlik marjı için eklenecek ek yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Prozentsatz für Sicherheitsmarge in technischen Berechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage supplémentaire à ajouter pour la marge de sécurité dans les calculs d'ingénierie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje adicional para agregar como margen de seguridad en cálculos de ingeniería.

inputs.label: Tolerance (± ft)
inputs.businessContext: Tolerance band for the converted length.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tolerance band for the converted length.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Bande de tolérance pour la longueur convertie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Banda de tolerancia para la longitud convertida.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
